handoff_focus: protect participation safety and determine whether mediation can proceed at all

escalation.rationale: Full handoff is required because autonomous continuation is no longer safe and the state includes a serious safety or coercion concern.

summary_state.next_step: Use the next step to hand the matter to a human mediator fully, preserving the current process breakdown and escalation rationale clearly.

active_flags.title: Participation appears constrained by coercive or intimidating pressure
active_flags.note: The interaction suggests compromised voluntariness or meaningful fear-based participation limits.

active_flags.title: A serious safety or voluntariness concern is active
active_flags.note: The interaction suggests autonomous continuation may be unsafe or illegitimate.

recent_turn_summaries.message_summary: Parent B insists everything is fine and says parent a is just being dramatic, while parent a becomes quieter and says they would rather not continue this conversation alone.
End joint session immediately and implement safety protocol with separate caucus for Party A
Parent A indicates relief that the discussion will stop for now, and parent b objects to the halt but the session does not continue autonomously.

case_title: Coercive-control cues and safety-compromised participation requiring protected handoff
